sys_script_client.description:
2.8 | 2022-09-15 | raj | DFCT0011326 - "Tasker Email form" should NOT display "N/A for email" 2.7.2 | 2022-01-13 | mmcc | STRY0110656 - UI- Fixed Header and Button Bars on ALL Modals and lists Added footer style display none
2.5.317 STRY0088787 - MODALS - (Portal/Platform) Task form Save Confirmation Message displays when updating task form before selecting an UI Modal
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Modal Save Changes Message Tasker - Email Task Information
sys_script_client.name: Tasker Email - onSubmit Open Modal
